extraction.one_line_summary: IZAGIRRE Ion won after brother Dylan sacrificed from breakaway, setup attack in final climb while Roglic lost 43 seconds to Carapaz due to clothing/mechanical issue.
tactical_patterns: Ineos attacked on descent early stage forcing selection, aggressive tactics despite dangerous wet conditions revealed comfort racing in rain.
Dylan Izagirre stayed 15 seconds ahead for 10+ kilometers giving brother Ion perfect draft and position for final climb attack.
Roglic suffered 43-second loss due to clothing/mechanical stop from cold, not legs, showing preparation failure for rain conditions.
Carapaz gained race lead without attacking, benefiting from Roglic's misfortune while pacing conservatively on Formigal's shallow 4.7% gradient.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: Lost 43 seconds and race lead due to clothing/mechanical issue from cold, tactical preparation failure not physical weakness
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: Took race lead without attacking, paced intelligently on shallow Formigal climb while rivals suffered equipment problems
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: positive: Finished 38 seconds behind stage winner, moved to second overall, showing unexpected Grand Tour GC legs for EF
rider_signals.IZAGIRRE Ion: positive: Capitalized on brother's 10km+ sacrifice ride, timed final attack perfectly despite being stage race non-favorite
rider_signals.WOODS Mike: positive: Second place finish shows strong form in cold/wet conditions often problematic for Canadian-based riders
